subject: Allow ovn networking work for demo in non-default namespaces
commit_message:
Allow ovn networking work for demo in non-default namespaces

Currently, vFW demo contained hardcoded namespace and
network attachment definition (created during KUD installation)
that prevented reusing it in different namespace. This has been
fixed by providing custom network attachment definition together
with demo charts so that necessary configuration will always be
provided in related namespace.

Issue-ID: MULTICLOUD-708

Signed-off-by: Konrad Bańka <k.banka@samsung.com>
Change-Id: I081514f8c4f3aff4e3f2a57384779bb0328057e2

This is a Multus requirement/issue and needs to be addressed in the way as in the current Helm chart.
